name: Ofox
description: Ofox — AI agent orchestration platform for building and deploying automated business workflow agents.

seo.title: Ofox — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Ofox: Ofox — AI agent orchestration platform for building and deploying automated business workflow agents.

when_to_use: Automating OCR and document digitization for enterprise workflows
Running structured data extraction from scanned paper documents
Building document processing pipelines for logistics and compliance
Digitizing legacy paper records with AI OCR automation

pros: Pre-built templates for common business flows
cons: Limited third-party reviews or case studies
Pricing tiers unclear for high-volume usage
No clear differentiation vs LangGraph or n8n
review.verdict: Fine for experimenting with agent workflows, but most teams will reach for LangGraph or established orchestrators first.
review.best_for: Ops teams prototyping agent automations without code
review.not_for: Engineering teams with LangChain or Temporal stack in place

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
